minimum_spanning_tree_weight: A spanning tree connects every node without cycles. The graph has one spanning tree with the smallest total edge weight. What is that total weight?
A spanning tree uses edges to connect all nodes and has no cycles. Among those trees, the minimum-weight one is unique. What is the sum of its edge weights?
Choose edges that connect every node without forming a cycle, with the smallest possible total edge weight. What total weight do those edges have?
Among all no-cycle edge sets that connect every node, one has the smallest total edge weight. What is that total weight?
Using the edge weights, find the unique lowest-total set of edges that connects all nodes without cycles. What is its total weight?
